name: Garniture La Jardinière
recipeIngredient: Tiny Carrots, canned or small frenched carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the vegetables by sautéing the carrots with butter and sugar until glazed.
2. Toss the turnips in butter.
3. Arrange the hot vegetables in small mounds around the platter of beef, alternating for color.
4. Garnish with parsley sprigs and small red peppers.
5. Serve a separate bowl of Hollandaise sauce with the vegetables.
